hero.sub: [COMPANY NAME] is a boutique studio in Mosta designing homes, additions and interiors across Malta and Gozo — quiet, considered work built from the island's own stone and sun.
statement.text: We design from the site outward — the fall of light, the run of a wall, the way a room should feel at six in the evening — before we design from a brief.
services.residential.title: Residential Design
services.residential.copy: New homes and additions across Malta and Gozo, designed from the plot outward — orientation, views and the character of the surrounding streetscape shape every plan before a single room does.
services.renovations.title: Renovations
services.renovations.copy: Careful work on townhouses and older properties: reading what a building wants to keep, and giving the rest room to become something quieter and more useful.
services.interior.title: Interior Architecture
services.interior.copy: Layout, light, joinery and material carried through to the last detail — interiors designed alongside the architecture, not applied to it afterwards.
services.planning.title: Planning & Permits
services.planning.copy: Full-service delivery through the Planning Authority process, from concept submission to final permit — one point of contact from first sketch to build.
split.title: A studio rooted in the island it builds on
split.note: Our studio sits in Mosta, a short drive from every site we work on across Malta and Gozo. Working close to the ground means fewer surprises on site, and a better sense of how a house should sit in its street. Led by Sean, our team of four carries every project from first sketch to final permit.
contact.title: Planning something in Malta or Gozo?
contact.sub: Tell us about the site and what you have in mind. We take on a small number of projects at a time, so an early conversation is the best place to start.
work.title: All projects
work.empty: No projects match — try a different search or filter.
